H3-FM-01: identify multiple contributing factors in a constrained source set
sort causes by direct and indirect influence
H3-FM-02: build a short context frame before explaining the event
highlight source details that establish setting and conditions
ask what was happening around this event that matters
H3-FM-03: contrast what we think now with what people knew then
H3-FM-04: simplify the source set and preteach key terms
verify whether comprehension supports materially change performance
